_source: Google SRE Workbook, Ch.5 'Alerting on SLOs', recommended multiwindow parameter table for a 30-day SLO. Period expressed in hours (30d = 720h). BR* = f * P / w.

cases.description: 2% of budget in 1h over 30d -> page fast-burn threshold 14.4 (Workbook headline)
5% of budget in 6h over 30d -> page threshold 6
10% of budget in 3d(72h) over 30d -> ticket threshold 1
